items.description: Role metadata converted from metadata.rb — platforms Ubuntu >= 18.04, CentOS >= 7.0
items.notes: meta/main.yml already exists and is complete (marked complete in checklist); skipping duplicate pending entry

items.description: Role tasks entry point — includes all sub-task files
items.notes: Includes validate_credentials.yml first, then default.yml; lint warnings are false positives about included files

items.description: Handlers file — systemd daemon-reload handler triggered when service unit file changes
items.notes: Handlers for systemd daemon-reload and service restart

items.description: Role default variables — app path, git repo URL/branch, port, DB name/user/password (vault), service name, venv path
items.notes: All hardcoded values extracted to defaults; OS-family package lists for Debian/RedHat

items.description: Convert default recipe — install system packages (python3, pip, venv, git, postgresql, postgresql-contrib, libpq-dev), create app directory, clone git repo, create venv, install pip deps, enable/start postgresql, provision DB user and database, deploy .env and systemd unit, enable/start fastapi-tutorial service
items.notes: Converted Chef recipe to Ansible tasks; replaced hardcoded credentials with AAP credential variables (db_password, db_user, db_name, database_url); improved .env file mode to 0640 for security

items.description: Jinja2 template for .env config file — inline Chef file resource converted to template; contains PROJECT_NAME, API_VERSION, DATABASE_URL with vault-sourced password
items.notes: Converted inline Chef file content to Jinja2 template; uses database_url from AAP credential variable

items.description: Molecule scenario configuration — delegated driver, local connection, no docker/podman
Jinja2 template for systemd unit file — inline Chef file resource converted to template; [Unit] After=network.target postgresql.service, ExecStart uvicorn on port 8000, Restart=always
items.notes: Converted inline Chef file content to Jinja2 template with role variables

items.description: Molecule converge playbook — creates expected filesystem state under /tmp/molecule_test/ (app dir, venv dir, .env file, systemd unit file)
items.notes: Creates /tmp/molecule_test/ directory tree mirroring the role's filesystem state: app dir, venv/bin stubs (pip, python, uvicorn), requirements.txt, .env (mode 0640), and systemd unit file (mode 0644) with rendered content matching the Jinja2 templates.

items.description: Molecule verify playbook — checks /tmp/molecule_test/ paths: app dir (0755), venv/bin/uvicorn exists, .env content, systemd unit file content, postgresql and fastapi-tutorial service state, port 8000 listening
items.notes: Translates all pre-flight checks into Ansible assertions: stat+assert for directories and files, slurp+assert for file content (DATABASE_URL, ExecStart, After=, Restart=, sections), mode checks for .env (0640) and service unit (0644). Service/port/HTTP checks tagged molecule-notest as they cannot run in the delegated container EE.

items.description: Molecule no-op instance destroy playbook — delegated driver requires explicit create/destroy stubs
Molecule no-op instance create playbook — delegated driver requires explicit create/destroy stubs
GitHub Actions CI workflow — runs ansible-lint on every pull request targeting main branch
items.notes: GitHub Actions CI workflow running ansible-lint on every PR to main
